prompt: Create a service that extends BaseUserService using service inheritance pattern. BaseUserService has a @get('/status') method. Child service TypicodeUserService should add @get('/posts') with @path('userId') and @query() for filtering. Both should use the same NamedFetcher.
expected_output: Service inheritance implementation with parent/child services sharing a fetcher
expectations: BaseUserService throws autoGeneratedError() in method body
TypicodeUserService has @query() for filtering on the posts method
Both services use the same fetcher (NamedFetcher registered with same name)
Child service properly inherits from parent service
